dance_of_shadows.name: Dance of Shadows
dance_of_shadows.description: Setup/Builder: A series of flowing strikes in the dark. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Flow Pip.

veiled_motion.name: Veiled Motion
veiled_motion.description: Setup: Move like a ghost. Generates 1 Flow Pip and grants [Haste].

twilight_finale.name: Twilight Finale
twilight_finale.description: Payoff: A final, overwhelming series of shadow strikes. Consumes 5 Flow Pips to deal massive damage.

spinning_shadow.name: Spinning Shadow
spinning_shadow.description: Payoff/AOE: A 360-degree strike that leaves shadow trails. Consumes 3 Flow Pips to strike all enemies in the room.

illusory_double.name: Illusory Double
illusory_double.description: Defense: Create a copy of yourself made of shadow. The next incoming hit will destroy the copy instead of hurting you.

graceful_evasion.name: Graceful Evasion
graceful_evasion.description: Defense: Effortlessly sidestep incoming attacks. Increases Evasiveness by 40% for 6 ticks.

shadow_leap.name: Shadow Leap
shadow_leap.description: Mobility: Leap into the shadow of another entity instantly.

shadow_melter.name: Shadow Melter
shadow_melter.description: Utility: Temporarily meld your physical form into a nearby shadow to avoid detection.

shadow_dancer_physiology.name: Shadow Dancer Physiology
shadow_dancer_physiology.description: Passive: Shadow Flow. You gain 5 Stamina every time you evade an attack while in the shadows.
